description: Composition Green kurta, made of two tone 100% cotton, has wrap-top style V-neck, three quarter length sleeves, gold stitch and trim details on top, gold trim at cuffs, hem and side vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Two tone fabric in pale and dark green gives a festive air to this kurta from aurelia. The wrap top style flatters all body shapes and the gold trim around the neckline will draw eyes upwards to your face. A versatile design which can be worn from day to evening, use gold accessories to dress this kurta up. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 35”
